page_title: Echo | A Quiet Place for Memories
hero_title:
A quiet place for
your memories.
hero_subtitle: Echo gently brings back one forgotten photo from your past every morning. No endless scrolling, no social pressure. Just one peaceful minute with a memory you cherish.
feat1_text: Social media feeds are loud and overwhelming. Echo is designed to be the exact opposite. We give you exactly one photo a day to reflect on. Once you've seen it, you're done. A healthy boundary for your mind.
feat2_text: Your life is private, and your photos should be too. Echo works entirely offline. We never upload your memories to a cloud, and we don't have servers. Everything stays perfectly safe on your own phone.
join_text: Echo is a premium, ad-free space. We rely entirely on our users to keep the app peaceful and private.
price1_desc: The most popular choice. Save over 35% compared to monthly.
price2_desc: Pay once, keep your quiet space forever.
support_text: Need help with Echo? We're here for you.
privacy_intro: Echo was built from the ground up to protect your privacy. We do not have servers, we do not track you, and your photos never leave your device.
privacy_data_text: We do not collect personal data. Everything is stored locally on your iPhone using Apple's secure storage.
privacy_analytics_text: We do not use any third-party analytics (like Firebase or Mixpanel). We rely solely on Apple's native, privacy-preserving MetricKit.
choices_text: You are in full control of your data. At any time, you can open Echo Settings to:
choices_list3: Manage your iOS photo library permissions.
price0_desc: Support our ad-free space on a monthly basis.
acc_intro: At Echo, we believe everyone deserves a quiet, safe place to store their memories. We have built our app to fully support Apple's core accessibility features.
acc_voiceover: Users can navigate and explore the app using gestures and speech output. All our buttons and features are properly labeled for screen readers.
acc_voicecontrol: Users can navigate and interact with the app using their voice to tap and swipe.
acc_largertext: Echo fully supports Dynamic Type. If you increase the text size in your iOS settings, our app will seamlessly scale to match.
acc_darkinterface: Echo is built natively as a dark, glassmorphic interface to reduce eye strain and provide a calming experience at all times.
acc_diffcolor: We use clear icons and text—not just color—to distinguish key information and actions.
acc_reducedmotion: We respect the iOS "Reduce Motion" setting by substituting bouncing spring animations with subtle fade transitions.
acc_contrast: We respect the iOS "Increase Contrast" setting by making our glassmorphic backgrounds fully opaque and increasing text contrast.
age_text: Echo is designed to be a safe, positive, and mindful space for users of all ages. Because of this, it is rated as suitable for ages 4 and up (4+).
age_bullet1: No Social Networking or unsolicited contact.
age_bullet2: No violent, mature, or inappropriate content.
